◎简　　介  

　　In Case of Emergency is a documentary that paints a startling picture of our ERs stretched to the breaking point and exposes the extent of our nation's broken safety net. All of our country's biggest public health challenges-from COVID-19 to the opioid crisis to gun violence to lack of insurance-collide in emergency departments.
